stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ ¬ (x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
priority_rationale: A consistent counterexample would directly decide the main no-C5 characterization question.

stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ x : α, x ≐ ⊠x ∧ ¬ (⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x)
priority_rationale: Targets the missing reverse inequality in the central fixedpoint versus ⊠⊤ problem.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α}, h.1 ≤ ⊠h.1 ↔ h.1 ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Bridges Henkin and reft-top behavior, but mainly as a local characterization.

stmt: There exists a type α with instances [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] and elements x y : α such that x ≐ ⊠x and y ≐ ⊠y hold, but x ≐ y does not hold.
priority_rationale: Useful countermodel showing uniqueness can fail without extra hypotheses, but mostly local.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → ⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x
priority_rationale: Nontrivial lower bound on reft-fixed points with plausible reuse in nearby characterizations.

stmt: There exists a four-element type α = {b, m, t, u} with preorder given by the reflexive-transitive closure of b ≤ m, b ≤ t, b ≤ u, m ≤ u, and t ≤ u, with distinguished elements ⊤ = t and ⊥ = b, with provability operator defined by □x = u for all x, and with reft operator defined by ⊠b = u, ⊠t = u, ⊠m = m, and ⊠u = b, such that α satisfies the ACR, Prov, Reft, and APS axioms, is consistent, has a Gödel fixpoint, and satisfies m ≐ ⊠m and ¬(m ≐ ⊠⊤).

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))

Let α = {b, p, t, r} with preorder generated by reflexivity together with p ≤ r and t ≤ r, with distinguished elements ⊤ = t and ⊥ = b, with provability operator defined by □x = r for every x, and with reft operator defined by ⊠b = t, ⊠t = r, ⊠p = p, and ⊠r = p. Then this structure satisfies the ACR, Prov, Reft, and APS axioms, and it is consistent.

Let α = {b, p, t, r} with preorder generated by reflexivity together with p ≤ r and t ≤ r, with distinguished elements ⊤ = t and ⊥ = b, with provability operator defined by □x = r for every x, and with reft operator defined by ⊠b = t, ⊠t = r, ⊠p = p, and ⊠r = p. Then p ≐ ⊠p holds, Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) holds, and ¬ (⊠⊤ ≤ p) holds.

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ACR.Consistent α ∧ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ∃ x : α, x ≤ □x ∧ ¬ (x ≐ ⊠x)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ((∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≐ □x) ↔ (□(⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)))

∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
priority_rationale: The existing concrete witness in Derived appears to already give this counterexample.

stmt: ∃ (α : Type _), ∃ (hA : ACR α), ∃ (hP : @ACR.Prov α hA), ∃ (hR : @ACR.Reft α hA), ∃ (hAPS : @ACR.APS α hA hP hR), letI : ACR α := hA; letI : ACR.Prov α := hP; letI : ACR.Reft α := hR; letI : ACR.APS α := hAPS; ∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (g.1 ≐ □g.1)
priority_rationale: Also looks extractable from the current witness model with a Gödel fixpoint.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Shallow corollary of the standard fact that any reft-fixed point lies below ⊠⊤.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → (x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) ↔ ⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x)
priority_rationale: Mostly a reformulation once the usual x ≤ ⊠⊤ direction is available.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → ¬ (x ≤ ⊥)
priority_rationale: Direct consequence of existing irrefutability results for Gödel fixpoints.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → x ≐ ⊠x
priority_rationale: Already the reverse implication of the proved reft-fixedpoint iff theorem.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α}, h.1 ≤ ⊠h.1 → h.1 ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Only the easy forward direction of the Henkin-to-reft-top bridge.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ¬ (⊬ □(⊠(⊤ : α)))
priority_rationale: Looks like a corollary of box-irrefutability plus equivalence to ⊠⊤.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → □x ≐ □(⊠(⊤ : α))
priority_rationale: Local consequence of reft-fixed points being equivalent to ⊠⊤ under C5.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≤ □g.1
priority_rationale: Immediate one-sided consequence of the Gödel-fixpoint axioms.

stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)
priority_rationale: Central universal characterization; proving or refuting it would reorganize the current theory.
